enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief daily vlog from Boulder, recapping that he worked until 4am on a 3D reconstruction project in Google Earth building classical Roman structures (a temple, housing, and Circus Flaminius). He plans to continue at a pace of one major building per day, with goals including the Basilica, Caracalla, and a mission, and muses that a fully rebuilt classical Rome could trigger past-life memories in visitors. He also mentions listening to a podcast about the Tetrarchy to inform a historical timeline project.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Excited and committed; believes rebuilding classical Rome would be beautiful and could unlock past-life memories
Prefers walking around at ground level over zooming in from above

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's Monday, November 28th, and he's recording a vlog for November 27th.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He just woke up at noon after working until 4:15 AM.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He smoked some 'rufr' about 6 or 7 minutes ago.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday, he worked on a temple next to the old school but didn't finish it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He also worked on housing and tracing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He did a 'circus flamenia' but isn't sure if he finished it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He aims to complete one big building a day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He still needs to work on 'bad as a caracol' and a mission.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He's excited to explore Rome using Google Earth to see it at ground level and walk around.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He wants to build a little room to 'unleash past life memories.'

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He thinks people might recognize the town he builds from past lives.

claims.subject: Rome
claims.claim: He wants to rebuild Rome the way it was in classical times because it's beautiful.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He's listening to a podcast and considering 'going down with the tetrake.'

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to work on two projects simultaneously: the podcast and his timeline for Italy/Rome.
